title: matelea johnstonii
intro: Matelea johnstonii, also known as the Johnston's Swallow Wort, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. Matelea johnstonii is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used as a tincture or added to topical creams for various health benefits.
